commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh You meet him that rejoices and works righteousness, those that remember you in your ways: behold, you are angry; for we have sinned: in those ways is continuance, and we shall be saved. The little band of Judas was sincerely attached to the Lord, 2 Machabees i. This excited thy anger. Yet thou wilt show mercy. Sin is often put for punishment. (Calmet) Vau means also, "for, and, yet. "Protestants, "for we have sinned. "But we follow St. Jerome and the Vulgate. (Worthington).
